_comment: Maps tool names (and optional sub-actions) to risk classes.

read.description: Non-mutating reads; no side-effects outside the agent process.

tool_patterns.description: exec calls that only read (cat, ls, grep, head, tail, find, etc.)

mutate.description: Writes or edits that change local state but are recoverable.

tool_patterns.description: exec calls that write files (tee, cp, mv, sed -i, etc.)
Editing or deleting a single message

destructive.description: Irreversible local or remote state destruction.

tool_patterns.description: Bulk deletion of messages beyond threshold
Terminating or steering a running session

external_write.description: Writes that cross a trust boundary to an external system or person.

tool_patterns.description: Sending a message to an external channel
Scheduling a cron job that delivers externally

financial.description: Commands that execute or commit financial transactions.

tool_patterns.description: exec calls invoking trade-execution or payment APIs
